problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
